creator: cpellet@earthlink.net
text:
having problems with communicator 4.73 giving me constant coredumps, most specifically when i try to apply any change or new thing to a composer site. communicator crashes and the coredump arrives. i am still relatively new to BSD and have no clue what i need to do. I have emailed NEtscape on the subject to no avail. HELP!!!

How-To-Repeat: assuming that it is a recurring problem for netscape, run composer, and try to apply several things, like inserting links, changing page color and other properties.
